UpgradeZone.action: The value of this parameter is upgradeToDiscount.
UpgradeZone.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters.
UpgradeZone.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing: Prepaid or Postpaid; currently only Prepaid is supported.
UpgradeZone.billing.reservation: Reservation details; not required for Postpaid, required for Prepaid.
